title: Warm Fluffy German Pork Dumplings
description: A traditional German dish featuring fluffy pork dumplings with a hint of green chilli, perfect for a comforting meal, this recipe is also sugar-free friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the pork mince, flour, eggs, green chilli, onion, salt, and black pepper, and mix well until just combined.
Using wet hands, shape the mixture into small dumplings, about 1 inch in diameter.
Place the dumplings in a steamer basket, leaving some space between each dumpling.
Pour the chicken broth into a large pot and bring to a boil.
Place the steamer basket over the boiling broth, cover with a lid, and steam the dumplings for 10 minutes.
After 10 minutes, remove the dumplings from the steamer and serve hot.
To pressure cook, place the dumplings in a pressure cooker with the chicken broth, close the lid, and cook for 5 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally before serving.
